items.title: US conducts strikes on Iran after attack on cargo ship
items.dek: US Central Command says it has struck missile and drone storage facilities and coastal radar positions.

items.title: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as families desperate for news
items.dek: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as international rescue teams start to arrive.
items.body: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as international rescue teams start to arrive.
